summary: [GAP] 3 entries lost in 2026-05-18 decisions.jsonl rollback incident
detail: Three decisions with timestamps between 2026-05-18T03:52Z and 2026-05-18T13:54Z are unrecoverable. Lost when `head -n -1` (GNU-only flag) failed silently on macOS BSD head during a rollback, producing an empty temp file that overwrote the canonical decisions.jsonl. State.json and memory.md rolled back cleanly; decisions.jsonl did not. Reconstruction below was assembled from session context: 6 entries (1-3 + 7-9) were recovered verbatim from earlier `head -3` / `tail -3` reads; this [GAP] marker records the 3 entries that fell between those two reads and were never in conversation context. If you remember what they were, replace this entry with the originals.

This produced repeated Telegram unresponsive alerts. Killed watchdog id `team-staleness` to stop the stale loop; team monitoring will resume on master restart or watchdog recreation.

Bug: team-staleness watchdog kept Telegram-alerting on claude-hermes-agent and claude-subctl after their tmux sessions no longer existed. summary: Clarified team watchdog lifecycle must unregister on team shutdown
detail: Operator clarified expected lifecycle semantics: if team spawn registers staleness monitoring, then intentional team shutdown must unregister that team and stop its watchdog/nudge loop at the same time. Updated the stale-team-watchdog bug with teardown and spawn lifecycle requirements plus regression cases.

summary: Closed template-spawn-500 handoff — fully resolved on main

Handoff at .subctl/docs/handoffs/2026-05-18-template-spawn-500.md marked RESOLVED. Operator action item recorded: redeploy ~/.local/lib/subctl-install/ + restart com.subctl.dashboard + com.subctl.master to make the fix live.

summary: Stale team-staleness watchdog bug — fix merged into working tree (uncommitted)
detail: expert-bun-typescript worker landed fix in worktree, 3-way merged into main tree (worktree was branched 16 commits behind HEAD; straight-copy attempt was reverted and replaced with a 3-way patch apply). Root cause: not the inbox-tailer re-population I hypothesized — actually three: (1) runWatchdogTick never wired runStaleTeamSweep's teamRegistryExists predicate (auto-nudge.ts had supported per-team reconciliation since v2.7.32; caller hadn't connected it), (2) refreshTeamActivityFromTmux's bulk-prune sits inside one outer try-catch so any tmux glitch silently skipped the prune, (3) tailInboxFile's first-scan re-seeded teamLastActivity from persisted jsonl files of dead teams; firstScanDone flag was declared but never assigned. Fix: new components/master/watchdog-prune.ts pure module (pruneVanishedTeams, pruneOneTeam, archiveInboxFile, injected TmuxRunner) + 8 tests covering all 5 bug-doc cases. Triple defense: dashboard-side kill-notify push + per-tick safety prune + sweep-time teamRegistryExists predicate. 32 tests pass (8 new + 15 auto-nudge + 9 team-gc). Diff: +165/-5 server.ts, +40/-0 dashboard/server.ts. Pending: operator review + commit + service restart.

summary: Recovered decisions.jsonl after BSD head rollback incident
detail: Reconstructed 7 of 9 pre-incident entries verbatim from session context (entries 1-3 from an earlier head -3 read, entries 7-9 from a later tail -3 read) plus the 2 new entries from today's work. Entries 4-6 marked with a [GAP] placeholder timestamped ts:GAP — actual content unrecoverable since they never entered conversation context. Going forward: every file edit on .subctl/docs/decisions.jsonl gets a .bak copy first; never use `head -n -<N>` on macOS (GNU-only flag).

summary: Idle-pane watchdog + cognition loop both enabled in operator's env
detail: Operator authorized go-live of both Memory Init #7 + idle-pane watchdog after Evy ran a 5-question preflight and confirmed: (1) v0.1 planner only emits 3 of 7 outcomes (noop/audit_only/notify_dashboard) — recommend_team_spawn / ask_operator / remember_candidate are typed but unreachable; (2) signal sources are watchdogs (hot), notifications (hot-if-backlog), followups (mostly silent); (3) first-hour blast radius forecast 0-8 dashboard notifications; (4) spawn defense is multi-layer (no provider in ExecutorProviders, server doesn't pass recordRecommendation, executor refuses spawn_team payload); (5) 24h watch period chosen. Config: bare {"enabled": true} for both, no deltas. Master restarted via launchctl kickstart -k. Boot log confirms: '[master] cognition-loop armed — interval=60000ms', '[master] idle-pane watchdog armed — interval=30000ms, threshold=3 ticks, auto_retry=false'. Evy self-scheduled first daily report for 2026-05-20. Re-tune suppression_window_ms to 30min if first-hour surfaces exceed 6.
